zh.lifeSummary: 當William Justice Pearle於大約1565年出生在英國武斯特斯爾時，他的父親Henry Allen Pearl26歲，母親Lydia Elizabeth Peabody24歲。他於1584年與Matilda Sarah Robinson在英國武斯特斯爾伍斯特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1590年在英國武斯特斯爾伍斯特享年26歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Justice Pearle于大约1565年出生在英国武斯特斯爾时，他的父亲Henry Allen Pearl26岁，母亲Lydia Elizabeth Peabody24岁。他于1584年与Matilda Sarah Robinson在英国武斯特斯爾伍斯特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1590年在英国武斯特斯爾伍斯特享年26岁。

nameMeanings.name: Pearle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Pierce
meanings: English, Welsh, and Irish: from the Anglo-Norman French and Middle English personal name Piers, Peres, Peris, an Old French nominative of Pierre or Per, the French form of Peter . Pierce is especially frequent in northwestern Wales and Lancashire, while Pearce is the more common spelling in the rest of England. In Ireland Pierce and Pearse represent a shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Piarais ‘son of Piaras’, a Gaelicized form of Piers.
Americanized form of some similar-sounding Jewish surname.
History: Franklin Pierce (1804–69), 14th president of the US, was born in Hillsborough, NH, on the New England frontier. His English ancestor Thomas Pierce emigrated to Charlestown, MA, in 1633/34.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: Justice
meanings: Temperance, Justice, and Prudence were names given to three daughters of John d'Anvers, of Calworth.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When William Justice Pearle was born about 1565, in Worcestershire, England, his father, Henry Allen Pearl, was 26 and his mother, Lydia Elizabeth Peabody, was 24. He married Matilda Sarah Robinson in 1584, in Worcester, Worcestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in 1590, in Worcester, Worcestershire, England, at the age of 26.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Justice Pearle est né environ 1565, à Worcestershire, Angleterre, son père, Henry Allen Pearl, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Lydia Elizabeth Peabody, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Matilda Sarah Robinson en 1584, à Worcester, Worcestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1590, à Worcester, Worcestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 26 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Justice Pearle um 1565 in Worcestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry Allen Pearl 26 und seine Mutter Lydia Elizabeth Peabody 24. Er hat 1584 in Worcester, Worcestershire, England Matilda Sarah Robinson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1590 im Alter von 26 Jahren in Worcester, Worcestershire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Justice Pearle è nato il circa 1565 nel Worcestershire, England, il suo padre, Henry Allen Pearl, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Lydia Elizabeth Peabody, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Matilda Sarah Robinson nel 1584, nel Worcester, Worcestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1590, nel Worcester, Worcestershire, England, all'età di 26 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Justice Pearleが約1565年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアで生まれた時，父Henry Allen Pearlは26歳，母Lydia Elizabeth Peabodyは24歳であった。1584年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアウオルセスターでMatilda Sarah Robinsonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1590年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアウオルセスターで26歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Justice Pearle(이)가 대략 1565년 영국 워스스터실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry Allen Pearl(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Lydia Elizabeth Peabody(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1584년 영국 워스스터실르 워스스터에서 Matilda Sarah Robinson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1590년 영국 워스스터실르 워스스터에서 26세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Justice Pearle nasceu aproximadamente 1565, em Worcestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry Allen Pearl, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Lydia Elizabeth Peabody, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Matilda Sarah Robinson em 1584, em Worcester, Worcestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1590, em Worcester, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, com 26 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Justice Pearle родился около 1565 г. в местности ворсестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Henry Allen Pearl было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Lydia Elizabeth Peabody, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Matilda Sarah Robinson в 1584 г. в местности ворсестир, ворсестиршир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1590 г. в местности ворсестир, ворсестиршир, Англия в возрасте 26 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Justice Pearle nació aproximadamente 1565, en Worcestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry Allen Pearl, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Lydia Elizabeth Peabody, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Matilda Sarah Robinson en 1584, en Worcester, Worcestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1590, en Worcester, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 26 años.
